enrichment.context_summary: The agent 'vm1' is running Ubuntu 22.04.5 LTS and has several open TCP ports, including SSH. It has multiple high severity vulnerabilities, including a critical flaw in libarchive that could allow arbitrary code execution. The recent installation of a new package may require further investigation due to these vulnerabilities.
